description:
You are an operations research analyst. Extract advanced workforce analytics from the Oracle HR database to feed into an optimization model. Generate the following four datasets and save them to the specified paths:

- /home/ga/Desktop/salary_percentiles.txt: For every employee, list Employee_ID, First_Name, Last_Name, Department_ID, Salary, DEPT_RANK (rank within department, highest salary=1), COMPANY_PERCENTILE (percent_rank over salary * 100, 1 decimal), and SALARY_QUARTILE (ntile 4). Order by Department_ID and Rank.
- /home/ga/Desktop/dept_budget_analysis.txt: For employees in departments with 3 or more people, list Employee_ID
